name: Stuffed Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
-------------
1.5 cups Sour dough breadcrumbs
1/4 cup Shallots, minced
1 tablespoon Garlic, minced
1/4 cup Fresh basil, minced
1/4 cup Feta cheese
1/4 cup Olive oil
1/4 cup Parmesan
1. Cut tomatoes in half; scoop out pulp (reserve for another dish or mince into stuffing).
2. Place upside down to drain.
3. Stuffing:
- Combine all ingredients except Parmesan.
- Spoon the mixture into tomatoes, placing them in a baking dish.
- Sprinkle with Parmesan.
4. Bake at 375°F until golden brown.
S: TV Food Network
Oh, this is delicious! I made this for the girls and I and we loved it-- ate 2 halves each. It baked quickly, but didn't time it-- try about 10 minutes or so but don't let the tomatoes get any more than warmed. The flavor changes too much and isn't pleasant.
